message:
feat: Add GPUBufferPool for persistent GPU buffer management

Adds LRU-based buffer pool to reduce GPU buffer creation overhead:

- New GPUBufferPool class with 256MB default pool size
- LRU eviction when pool exceeds capacity
- invalidatePrefix() for table-level cache invalidation
- Optional buffer caching in all GPU modules via key parameters

GPU modules updated:
- gpu-aggregations: bufferKey param for input caching
- gpu-joins: leftBufferKey/rightBufferKey options
- gpu-vector-search: vectorsBufferKey for embedding caching
- gpu-sort, gpu-group-by: pool available for future use

All 131 tests pass (17 GPU, 100 vault-sql, 14 unit).
